title: Battle of Yag'Dhul (disambiguation)
content:
There have been at several battles fought at [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]]:

*A '''[[Battle of Yag'Dhul (Jedi Civil War)|battle]]''' during the [[Jedi Civil War]]
*A '''[[Battle of Yag'Dhul (Imperial era)|battle]]''' in [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]]
*The '''[[Battle of Yag'Dhul (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Yag'Dhul]]''', fought in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]
*A '''[[Raid on Yag-prime|raid]]''' on the space station [[Yag-prime]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]
*A '''[[Battle of Yag'Dhul (Bacta War)|battle]]''' during the [[Bacta War]] of [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]
*A '''[[Battle of Yag'Dhul (Thrawn campaign)|battle]]''' during the [[Thrawn campaign]] of [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]
*A '''[[Battle of Yag'Dhul (Operation Shadow Hand)|battle]]''' during the [[Operation Shadow Hand]]
*A '''[[Battle of Yag'Dhul (26 ABY)|battle]]''' in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]
*A '''[[Battle of Yag'Dhul (29 ABY)|battle]]''' in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]
